assertions.title: Platform dashboard exposes only control-plane telemetry

steps.expected: Dashboard includes control-plane telemetry and omits tenant business datasets
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with top-level data keys ['activeTenants', 'billingSummary', 'deactivatedTenants', 'suspendedTenants', 'tenants', 'totalActiveUserQuota', 'totalActiveUsers', 'totalAuditStorageBytes', 'totalConcurrentRequestQuota', 'totalCurrentConcurrentRequests', 'totalStorageQuotaBytes', 'totalTenants']; business keys present: []

assertions.title: Platform dashboard billing summary is derived from manual billing-plan truth

steps.action: Inspect dashboard billingSummary before and after billing-plan update
steps.expected: ARR/MRR fields are present without tenant-ledger or order-rollup payloads
steps.observed: billingSummary keys=['billedTenantCount', 'totalAnnualRecurringRevenue', 'totalMonthlyRecurringRevenue']; baseline monthly/annual=299.99/3599.88; after update=409.99/4919.88

assertions.title: Tenant list supports lifecycle filtering and returns control-plane summaries only

steps.observed: HTTP n/a body={"success": false, "message": "status filter must be ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, or DEACTIVATED", "data": {"traceId": "25c4e7d6-9c19-425a-adf9-e416f818b4c8", "reason": "status filter must be ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, or DEACTIVATED", "p

assertions.title: Tenant detail is the control-plane source of truth for one tenant

steps.expected: Tenant detail includes onboarding, lifecycle, limits, usage, modules, billing plan, support context/timeline, main admin, and available actions
steps.observed: HTTP 200 for tenant 1 / UAT01 with keys ['availableActions', 'billingPlan', 'companyCode', 'companyId', 'companyName', 'enabledModules', 'lifecycleReason', 'lifecycleState', 'limits', 'mainAdmin', 'onboarding', 'stateCode', 'supportContext', 'supportTimeline', 'timezone', 'usage']

assertions.title: Platform-owner detail never exposes tenant business data

steps.action: Review dashboard, tenant list row, and tenant detail payloads for business datasets
steps.expected: No tenant orders, invoices, journal entries, dealer ledgers, catalog inventory, payroll, or manufacturing datasets are embedded
steps.observed: dashboard business keys=[], list row business keys=[], detail business keys=[]

evidence.output: No business dataset keys found in inspected payloads

assertions.title: Manual billing-plan data is editable through a dedicated control-plane route and visible in tenant detail

steps.expected: Billing-plan mutation succeeds and tenant detail reflects stored billing-plan subtree
steps.observed: Updated billing plan response={"planCode": "VALRUN", "planName": "Validation Plan", "currency": "USD", "monthlyRate": 409.99, "annualRate": 4919.88, "seats": 77, "updatedAt": "2026-04-21T02:30:41.378945066Z", "updatedBy": "platform.admin@local.test"}; detail billingPlan={"planCode": "VALRUN", "planName": "Validation Plan", "currency": "USD", "monthlyRate": 409.99, "annualRate": 4919.88, "seats": 77, "updatedAt": "2026-04-21T02:30:41.378945Z", "updatedBy": "platform.admin@local.test"}

evidence.output: updated plan code=VALRUN monthly=409.99 annual=4919.88 seats=77

assertions.title: Billing-plan changes roll into platform ARR and MRR summaries

steps.action: Compare dashboard billingSummary before and after tenant billing-plan mutation
steps.expected: ARR/MRR rollups increase to include the updated manual plan values without exposing tenant accounting ledgers

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed twice in this environment without returning output.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation, consistent with prior mission user-testing rounds recorded in `.factory/validation/**/user-testing`.

frictions.description: The checked-out `.env` overrides compose ports to 18081/19090/18025 by default, while the mission requires 8081/9090/8025.
frictions.resolution: Started the validation stack with explicit port overrides and recorded the setup note in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

frictions.description: Aggregate actuator health stayed `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` even though readiness was `200` and the target auth/control-plane APIs were responsive.
frictions.resolution: Used readiness plus live endpoint probes as the runtime readiness gate for this targeted validation round.

summary: Validated 7 assigned platform-dashboard assertions with live API evidence: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
